top_signals.title: New York Thunderstorms Raise Flood Risk as Heat Dissipates
top_signals.summary: New York City will have a cooler, soggier Sunday now that the massive heat dome across the US East that taxed power grids and snarled transit has started to crack, while lingering high temperatures in Washington and across the Mid-Atlantic triggered air quality warnings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
